info.name: Glow Fix API - Complete Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for Glow Fix Backend - Includes all endpoints: Authentication, User Management, Businesses (Manager/Admin/Public), Bookings, Clients, Vehicles, Services, Categories, Loyalty, Reviews, Notifications, and Avatar management

request.description: Register a new client account - Required: fullName, email, password
Register a new manager account - Required: fullName, email, password (8+ chars with uppercase, lowercase, number, special char)
Register a new admin account - Required: fullName, email, password
Login - identifier can be email or phone, password required
Verify OTP for registration or login
Resend OTP to email
Request password reset
Reset password with OTP
Get authenticated user's full profile
Get authenticated user's client profile with location
Update authenticated user's profile - Optional fields: full_name, email, phone, avatar_url
Upload user avatar
Change user password
Delete user account
Create a new business profile (Manager only) - Required: businessName, address, latitude, longitude - Optional: contactPhone, contactEmail, operatingHours
Get manager's business profile
Update manager's business profile - All fields optional: businessName, address, latitude, longitude, contactPhone, contactEmail
Get business operating hours
Update business operating hours
Get business documents
Upload a business document - Type options: BUSINESS_REGISTRATION, INSURANCE_CERTIFICATE, TAX_CARD - Supported formats: PDF, PNG, JPG, WEBP
Delete a document
Get onboarding progress

query.description: Filter by status: PENDING_REVIEW, APPROVED, REJECTED, SUSPENDED

request.description: Get all businesses with optional status filter (Admin only)
Set business status (APPROVED, REJECTED, SUSPENDED) - Admin only - Required: status - Optional: reason (required for REJECTED/SUSPENDED)
Reject a business application - Use 'reason' field (not rejectionReason)
Set document status (APPROVED, REJECTED) - Admin only - Required: status - Optional: reason (required for REJECTED)

item.name: Businesses - Public
item.description: Public endpoints to view approved businesses

request.description: List all approved businesses (Public)
Get details of a specific approved business (Public)

query.description: Filter by status: CONFIRMED, VEHICLE_RECEIVED, INSPECTION_IN_PROGRESS, WAITING_CLIENT_APPROVAL, REPAIR_IN_PROGRESS, READY_FOR_PICKUP, COMPLETED, CANCELLED
Search by client name, email, phone, license plate, or vehicle model

request.description: Get all bookings for manager's business (paginated) - Optional filters: status, from, to, search
Get full details of a specific booking

Update booking status - Status options: CONFIRMED, VEHICLE_RECEIVED, INSPECTION_IN_PROGRESS, WAITING_CLIENT_APPROVAL, REPAIR_IN_PROGRESS, READY_FOR_PICKUP, COMPLETED, CANCELLED - Required: status - Optional: reason
Update expected delivery date for a booking - Required: expectedDeliveryAt (ISO format)
Retrieve all internal notes associated with a booking
Add an internal note to a booking - Required: body (note text)
Create a diagnostic report with findings and recommended repairs - Required: summary - Optional: validUntil (ISO date), estimatedDuration (minutes), findings[], recommendedRepairs[]
Get diagnostic report details for a booking
Add an individual finding to the diagnostic report - Required: title, priority (CRITICAL|WARNING|INFO) - Optional: description
Recommend a catalog service repair for the diagnostic report - Required: businessServiceId (service UUID)
Delete a recommended repair from the diagnostic report
Get client profile with stats
Get current location
Update current location - Required: latitude, longitude
Get client statistics (total bookings, vehicles, reviews, etc.)
Get loyalty points summary
Find nearby businesses within specified radius
Add a new vehicle - Required: licensePlate, make, model, year, color
Get all vehicles for authenticated user
Get vehicle details with statistics
Update vehicle details - All fields optional
Delete a vehicle
Get all service categories (Public)
Get category details (Public)
Search services with filters (Public)

query.description: Sort by: POPULAR, NEW, RATING, PRICE_ASC, PRICE_DESC

request.description: Get service discovery with sorting (Public)
Assign a service to manager's business - Required: serviceId, price, duration (minutes)
Bulk assign multiple services to business - Required: services array with serviceId, price, duration
Update service pricing and duration for business - Optional: price, duration
Enable/disable a service for business - Required: isActive (boolean)
Remove a service from business
Get all available service categories (Public)
Get all service categories for a specific business (Public)
Get services by category for a specific business (Public) - categoryName examples: WASH, REPAIR, DETAILING, etc.
Get service details by business_service_id (Public)
Get loyalty points summary (points balance, tier, etc.)
Get loyalty transaction history with pagination
Get quick redeem options (e.g., 100 pts → EGP 10)
Calculate potential redemption for a booking - Optional: bookingId, pointsToRedeem
Redeem loyalty points - Optional: bookingId, pointsToRedeem
Update loyalty program configuration for business - Optional: earningRate, redemptionValue, minRedeemPoints
Create a review for a completed booking - Required: bookingId, rating, title, body
Check if user can review a booking
Get reviews written by authenticated user
Get all reviews for a business (Public)
Get rating summary for a business (Public)
Update your own review - Optional: rating, title, body
Delete your own review
Get user notifications with pagination
Get count of unread notifications
Mark a notification as read
Mark all notifications as read
Delete a notification
Upload or replace profile avatar - JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF — max 5 MB
Remove profile avatar

variable.description: JWT access token - Get from login response
Recommended repair ID for delete requests
First service ID for bulk assign
Second service ID for bulk assign
